title: Welcome to My New Journal
body:
## Hello World

This is my first dynamic blog post. It is fetched from a JSON file and rendered using JavaScript.

### Why this matters

Static sites are fast, but sometimes we need dynamic content without a heavy backend. This solution uses **JSON** as a data source.

- Light
- Fast
- Easy to maintain
description: An introduction to the new dynamic blog system.

title: The Economist's Edge
body: In the world of entrepreneurship, passion often gets the spotlight, but financial discipline is the unsung hero that guarantees longevity and scale...
description: How financial discipline scales a brand nationally.
